message.content:
Okay, little buddy, think of it like playing make-believe. On Halloween, everyone knows it's a special day where people dress up and pretend to be different characters, like superheroes, pirates, or policemen. It's all just for fun! 

But on regular days, if someone wears a police costume and tries to act like a real policeman, people might get confused or worried because they won't know if they're just pretending or if they're really trying to trick others. That's why there are rules to keep everyone safe.

On Halloween, everyone knows it's pretend time, so it's usually okay as long as you're just having fun and not trying to fool anyone or do anything a real officer would do.
